title: Beachfront condo
desc:
Luxury beachfront condo in Hua Hin, delivered as a shell (structural build) so you can customize the interior layout and finishes to your taste. The plot is approx. 382.8 m² and the usable/living area is approx. 340 m².

The condo features 3 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms and a separate staff room. The estate offers resort-style amenities: large lagoon pool (with bridges/tunnels), golf-cart service, beachfront clubhouse (library, restaurant), tennis court, game room, fitness center, shuttle service, and 24/7 security with access control and CCTV.

Stated common fee: 240 THB/m².

desc:

The villa features 4 bedrooms and 3 bathrooms.

title: InterContinental Residences Hua Hin — 3-bedroom duplex with private pool
desc:
Premium beachfront living at InterContinental Residences Hua Hin: a 3-bedroom / 2-bathroom duplex (approx. 158 m²) with a private saltwater pool and high-end furnishings. Listed at the displayed “special price”. Foreign quota available (purchase by foreigners subject to availability).

5-star style services & amenities: concierge/butler, valet & luggage assistance, on-demand services, wellness (in-room spa, personal training), 24/7 security + CCTV, and extensive facilities (main pool, kids/therapy pools, yoga lawn, gardens, beach pavilion, seaside jacuzzi, jogging track, gym, library, game room, etc.).
features: Resort amenities (pools, gym, gardens, beach pavilion, seaside jacuzzi, library, game room)

title: New single-storey villa with private pool  (Khao Tao)
desc:
Modern villas with private pool in Khao Tao (Hua Hin). Exclusive project of 6 high-quality villas completed in 2025 by CLC Development (known for The Sky 126). Located next to Khao Tao Lake and about a 5-minute walk to the beach, the project combines peace, nature and easy access to Hua Hin’s attractions.

Indicative distances: main road ~2 min, city center ~10 min, train station ~10 min, airport ~30 min, night market ~10 min, golf courses ~15 min.

title: Luxury villa with land  (Hin Lek Fai)
desc:
New project of villas and land for sale in Hua Hin, in the Hin Lek Fai area. A peaceful, nature-surrounded setting designed for modern comfort.

The showcased unit matches Type B (fully furnished villa): approx. 400 m² land, approx. 196 m² living area, 3 bedrooms, 4 bathrooms and an 8×3 m swimming pool.

Nearby: local markets (Nong Khon / Khaonthong) and a convenience store (7-Eleven). Approx. drive times: Hua Hin beach ~10 min, Market Village ~20 min, Bluport ~20 min.

title: Two-storey beachfront villa
desc:
Luxury beachfront villa in Hua Hin, delivered as a shell (structural build) so you can customize the interior layout and finishes to your taste. The plot is approx. 382.8 m² and the usable/living area is approx. 340 m².

The villa features 3 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms and a separate staff room. The estate offers resort-style amenities: large lagoon pool (with bridges/tunnels), golf-cart service, beachfront clubhouse (library, restaurant), tennis court, game room, fitness center, shuttle service, and 24/7 security with access control and CCTV.

Stated common fee: 240 THB/m².

title: Tropical oasis – 3‑bedroom pool villa
desc: This luxury 280 m² villa is a tropical oasis in Hin Lek Fai, about 5 km from Hua Hin’s centre. The modern architecture features an open‑plan living and dining area and a fully equipped European kitchen. Three spacious bedroom suites each include a dressing room and private bathroom; the master suite has an outdoor shower. A separate guest wing with its own entrance provides extra privacy. Outdoors a 9.5 × 4 m saltwater infinity pool with integrated jacuzzi is framed by landscaped gardens, waterfalls and a fish pond. A carport, laundry, technical and storage rooms complete this 2025‑built property.
features: 9.5 × 4 m infinity saltwater pool with jacuzzi
Separate guest wing with private entrance
Outdoor shower in the master suite
Landscaped gardens with waterfalls & fish pond

title: Luxurious pool‑villa retreat
desc: This 218 m² villa sits on a 640 m² plot in the quiet Hin Lek Fai district. The open‑plan living area opens onto the garden and a 40 m² private pool. Two generous bedrooms each have an en‑suite bathroom, providing comfort and privacy. The home uses high‑quality materials including moisture‑protected slabs and heat/sound‑insulated walls. It is elegantly furnished with a European kitchen, mosquito screens, covered carport and laundry. Completed in 2025, the villa offers a relaxing retreat close to Hua Hin’s shops and markets.
features: Open living area with garden/pool view

title: Modern pool villa
desc: This modern Signature villa offers 206 m² of living space on a 456 m² plot in Hin Lek Fai. The contemporary architecture combines an open‑plan living and dining area with a European kitchen. Two comfortable bedrooms each have a private bathroom, and there’s a guest WC. The home is finished with high‑quality materials and includes storage rooms and a large laundry. Outside you’ll find a private saltwater pool and covered terrace for relaxing. Located in a quiet area near shops and markets, the villa was completed in 2024.

title: Luxury pool villa – Palm Avenue
desc: Located in the exclusive Palm Avenue project, this luxury 310 m² villa sits on a 629 m² plot. The living area and kitchen open onto a large covered terrace and a 12 × 4 m saltwater pool. Three bedrooms each have an en‑suite bathroom; one guest room is separated from the main house for added privacy and has direct pool access. Other features include a guest WC, large storage and laundry rooms, high‑quality construction materials and a landscaped garden. Completed in 2024, the villa is close to shops, restaurants and the local market.
features: Separate guest room with pool access
Palm Avenue community close to amenities

title: Elegant pool villa
desc: This elegant 245 m² villa built in 2024 is located in Hin Lek Fai on a 612 m² plot. The open plan living-dining area leads to a modern European kitchen and opens onto a covered terrace and private pool. Two generous bedrooms are served by three bathrooms, including a guest WC. The landscaped garden and high walls ensure complete privacy. Quality materials and refined design provide a luxurious living environment. Shops, restaurants and the market are easily accessible.
features: Open living-dining area with European kitchen
Landscaped garden with high privacy walls

title: Stylish pool villa
desc: This stylish villa offers 231 m² of living space on a 574 m² plot in Hin Lek Fai, built in 2024. The master suite features a dressing room and en‑suite bathroom; two additional bedrooms share a second bathroom. The open living-dining area flows into a modern European kitchen. A large laundry and storage area complete the interior. Large glass doors open to the covered terrace, generous garden and private pool. Set in a peaceful environment with good access and close to amenities.
features: Master suite with dressing and en‑suite
Glass doors opening to covered terrace

title: Stunning 3‑bedroom house with private pool
desc: This 184 m² villa on a 500 m² plot is located in Thap Tai, west of Hua Hin. The bright living area includes a dining space and a fully equipped European kitchen (oven, dishwasher, microwave, washing machine and refrigerator). The master bedroom has an en‑suite bathroom with bathtub, while two additional bedrooms share a second bathroom. Outside you’ll find a private pool, covered terrace and covered carport. The house is sold fully furnished with quality appliances. It lies in a quiet, secure environment near the BluPort mall, water park and golf courses. Estimated year of construction: 2020.
features: Near BluPort mall, water park & golf

title: Luxury villa in safe community
desc: This 146 m² villa is located in a secure international village in Khao Tao (Nong Kae), managed by Swiss residents and close to the beach. It offers two bedrooms with en‑suite bathrooms, a large living room and a European kitchen. A 40 m² terrace overlooks the landscaped garden. The house is sold fully furnished with quality finishes and modern fittings. A private parking space is included and residents enjoy a safe and peaceful environment 15 km south of Hua Hin and 2 km from Had Sai Noi beach. Estimated year of construction: 2015.
features: European kitchen and spacious living room
2 km from Had Sai Noi beach & 15 km south of Hua Hin

title: Cozy villa with garden and sala
desc: Located in the same secure village in Khao Tao, this cozy 90 m² villa comprises one bedroom and one bathroom. A living and dining area with European kitchen opens onto a covered terrace and garden sala. The house is fully furnished with high‑quality materials and includes private parking and a pretty garden. The village provides a tranquil setting close to the beach and Hua Hin’s centre. Estimated year of construction: 2015.
features: Secure village close to the beach

title: Perfect villa near the beach
desc: Located in Khao Tao, this 146 m² villa on a 514 m² plot combines tranquillity with proximity to the beach. Two bedrooms with full bathrooms are complemented by a spacious living area and European kitchen. A large 40 m² covered terrace overlooks the landscaped garden. The villa is fully furnished with high‑quality materials, has private parking and sits within a secure community just minutes from beaches and nature. Estimated year of construction: 2015.
features: European kitchen and spacious living area

title: Modern sea‑view condo with panoramic view, Hua Hin
desc: Perched on a high floor with sweeping ocean views, this modern condominium offers 56.89 sqm of living space with two bedrooms, one bathroom and a bright living area opening onto a balcony. The unit benefits from exceptional exposure and the building boasts a full suite of luxury amenities: a lobby with viewing terrace, lap and children’s pools, wellness garden, co‑creative hub with library and shared kitchen, fitness zone, living studio and a sky meditation deck. The sale includes air‑conditioning, hot‑water system and a balcony for enjoying the sea breeze. A prime opportunity for buyers seeking a panoramic sea‑view residence with easy access to the Water Jungle park.

title: Smart condo in central Hua Hin, Nong Kae
desc: This 31 sqm smart condo sits on the 6th floor of the Baan Kiang Fah building. Fully furnished with a fitted kitchen, dining area and separate bedroom, it is ready to live in or rent out. Its central location gives quick access to the beach, markets and Hua Hin hospital. Residents enjoy a communal pool and gym, library, games area and 24‑hour security. A perfect investment or comfortable city pied‑à‑terre.

title: Studio condo with sea view, Hua Hin
desc: Perfectly positioned on the 9th floor of Baan Kiang Fah, this 30.89 sqm studio enjoys a superb view of the sea and the city. Partly furnished, it offers a flexible space with sleeping area, kitchenette and modern bathroom. The 26‑storey residence, completed in 2015, houses 616 units and quality amenities: swimming pool, library, fitness centre, parking, landscaped areas and round‑the‑clock security. Just minutes from the True Arena, Cicada Market and the beaches, this property makes an excellent seaside pied‑à‑terre.

title: Beachside pet‑friendly condo in Hua Hin
desc: Just 200 metres from the beach, this bright 43 sqm condo features a bedroom, bathroom, kitchen and living room. Fully furnished, it welcomes pets – a rare find in Hua Hin. Built in 2010, it provides a balcony with city view and easy access to shopping such as Makro and Market Village (8 km) as well as Bluport and Bangkok Hospital. The residence offers a pool, gardens and parking and ensures round‑the‑clock security. An ideal pied‑à‑terre for beach‑side living with your four‑legged friend.

title: Condo for sale in central Hua Hin
desc: This modern 27 sqm condo, located on an upper floor, offers a clear mountain view. It includes a bedroom, bathroom and separate kitchen and living room. Partly furnished, it awaits your personal touch. The 2020‑built residence offers a swimming pool and fitness room and enjoys a prime location: two minutes from Bluport Shopping Mall, seven minutes from Market Village and close to Bangkok Hospital, Cicada Market and Hua Hin Beach. Security is provided by round‑the‑clock guards and key‑card access.

title: Cozy and convenient condo with panoramic view in Hua Hin
desc: This charming 32 sqm condo on the 14th floor of the Baan Kiang Fah project enjoys panoramic views over the Vana Nava Water Park and the sea. The layout includes a bedroom, bathroom, separate kitchen and a pleasant balcony. The sale includes a TV, air conditioner, refrigerator, water heater and all furniture. Communal facilities comprise a swimming pool, fitness room, advanced security system and parking. Located in the heart of Nong Kae, the residence is close to the water park, Bangkok Hospital and the Bluport and Market Village malls. Rarely used and never rented, this unit is ready to move into.

title: Brand‑new trendy condo in Hua Hin
desc: This brand‑new 25.75 sqm condo is fully furnished with sofa, bed, air‑conditioning, equipped kitchenette, shelves and dining set. Located on the main road, it offers easy access to all amenities and sits near the True Arena Fitness Center, Bluport (2.5 km), Market Village (3 km), Cicada Market and Hua Hin Hospital. Developed by Sansiri, the project provides a communal pool, fitness room and high‑level security. An ideal opportunity for a first home or rental investment.
features: Close to shopping centres and markets

title: Seaside Serenity condo – Hua Hin
desc: Set on the 11th floor of Baan Kiang Fah, this 31 sqm studio in calming blue and white tones offers a captivating view of the sea and the Vana Nava water park. It has a separate kitchen, balcony and comes with a TV, air conditioner, refrigerator and water heater. Never rented and meticulously maintained, it is ready to occupy. Residents enjoy a pool, jacuzzi, gym, library, table‑tennis room and parking, all secured with 24‑hour surveillance. An unmissable seaside opportunity.
features: 11th floor with sea and water park view

title: Condo between Cha‑am and Hua Hin in tropical complex
desc: Nestled between Cha‑am and Hua Hin, this residence is surrounded by towering tropical trees and promotes a lifestyle focused on nature and well‑being. The fully furnished 40 sqm apartment features a bedroom, bathroom, kitchenette and sits on the 5th floor of a 7‑storey building. The project boasts an incredible 100‑metre swimming pool dotted with private islands, a shaded walkway leading to the fitness building and the sea, as well as parking, a fitness centre, CCTV and round‑the‑clock security. It is close to hospitals, schools, restaurants and shopping malls in Hua Hin and Cha‑am, blending lush nature with modern conveniences.

title: Modern studio condo in downtown Hua Hin
desc: Located on the 6th floor of a modern residence, this 26 sqm studio offers a bedroom with living and kitchen area. The condominium provides upscale amenities: salt‑system pool, fully equipped gym, sunken garden, co‑working space and panoramic lobby. Security is ensured around the clock by guards and CCTV. Its location in the heart of Hua Hin is ideal: 400 m from the Blúport shopping mall and 800 m from the beach. A perfect pied‑à‑terre to enjoy city life and beach pleasures.

title: Brand-new modern style pool villa
desc: This brand-new modern pool villa in Hua Hin offers luxurious living with a private swimming pool. The house provides approximately 303 sqm of living space with multiple spacious bedrooms and bathrooms. Designed in a contemporary style, it features bright open living areas connected to the terrace and pool. Ideal as a primary residence or a holiday home in Thailand.

title: Modern 1-bedroom condo with mountain view in central Hua Hin
desc: Well-maintained 1-bedroom, 1-bathroom apartment on the 5th floor of a 7-story building. Offering 47.30 sqm of modern living space, fully furnished and ready to move in. Enjoy an unobstructed mountain view directly from the room.

title: Beautiful condo with golf course and sea view
desc: A luxurious, low-density contemporary resort-style condominium. This 3rd-floor unit offers a rare sense of tranquility with stunning golf course and sea views over Khao Takiab beach. Only 66 exclusive units in the building.

title: Luxury beachfront condominium in Cha-am
desc: A luxury beachfront development with premium facilities including a sky lounge with an infinity rooftop pool and a 67m long beach pool. This 9th-floor unit offers 46.03 sqm of living space, fully furnished with a sea view.

title: Exclusive 3-bedroom pool villas near Black Mountain Golf Course
desc: Contemporary Asian-inspired open-plan pool villas located in a quiet valley with stunning mountain views. This 250 sqm living space property includes a private swimming pool, luxury European kitchen, and is fully furnished.

title: Dream house with private pool in Hin Lek Fai
desc: A brand new, fully furnished private pool house located in the scenic and quiet area of Hin Lek Fai. Built in 2025, this property is perfect for relaxation or retirement, offering a modern living space and convenient access to Hua Hin center.
features: Fully furnished & Ready to move in

title: Charming two-story house with private pool
desc: Luxurious 4-bedroom villa with a private saltwater pool located near Black Mountain Water Park, just 10 km from Hua Hin city center. This 2-story detached house offers a large garden, modern design, and is fully furnished with high-quality decor.
features: Fully furnished & Ready to move in

title: House for sale – Central Hua Hin (Soi 94)
desc: Charming 2-story pool villa located in one of Hua Hin's most popular areas. Only a 5-minute drive to Market Village and walking distance to local markets, restaurants, and bars. This property features a versatile extra room, two kitchens (Thai and European), and a private pool.

title: Luxury pool villa near Queen Sirikit's retreat, Hin Lek Fai
desc: Brand new 4-bedroom pool villa built in 2025, located right next to Khao Phra Tamnak Ruedeewanalai Mountain. This fully furnished property offers a 360-degree panoramic mountain view, a private swimming pool, and a roof terrace.
features: Fully furnished & Ready to move in
Near Big C Market and Bangkok Hospital

title: Luxurious 3-bedroom pool villa in Soi 112
desc: Elegant two-story luxury pool villa offering privacy and modern living. Features a bright open-plan living area, a private swimming pool, and large windows creating a light and airy atmosphere throughout. Located in the highly sought-after Soi 112 area.

title: Luxury 3-bedroom pool villa in Soi 112
desc: Experience modern tropical living in this beautiful two-story luxury pool villa. Designed for comfort and privacy, it features a bright open-plan living area that leads directly to the private swimming pool. Located just a few minutes from the city center and beaches.

title: Modern 1-bedroom condo at The 88 Condo Hua Hin
desc: A well-maintained 1-bedroom, 1-bathroom apartment on the 2nd floor of an 8-story building completed in 2016. Offering 40.96 sqm of modern living space, fully furnished with a pool view. Located in Soi 88, close to Villa Market and Market Village.

title: Modern 1-bedroom condo in Hua Hin City Center
desc: A coastal-style condominium carefully decorated with premium materials. Located near Phetkasem Road, this 3rd-floor unit offers easy access to shopping malls, restaurants, trendy cafes, and the beach. Perfect for a special time in Hua Hin.

title: Beachfront duplex condo with sea views in Cha-am
desc: A modern 16th-floor duplex apartment in an 18-story beachfront building. Offering 44.3 sqm of living space, this unit features stunning sea views and a unique single-corridor design ensuring privacy. Perfect for those seeking luxury by the sea.

title: Studio with beach access
desc: A luxury low-density condominium designed in a contemporary resort style. This 2nd-floor studio offers 34 sqm of living space with pool views. Located near the clean, long beach of Khao Takiab, surrounded by lush pines and tropical flora.

title: Beachfront 2-bedroom apartment with sea view
desc: Ideally located halfway between Cha-am and Hua Hin, this beachfront apartment offers a serene environment just 10 minutes from Hua Hin city. The unit features large windows and a spacious balcony designed to maximize the natural beauty and sea breeze.

title: Condominium with beach access in Cha-am
desc: A modern 1-bedroom apartment on the 4th floor of an 18-story beachfront building. Designed for maximum comfort with a single-corridor layout providing direct sea views. This unit offers 46.39 sqm of living space in a luxurious and quiet coastal atmosphere.

title: Breathtaking Sea and City view at The 88 Condo Hua Hin
desc: A modern 1-bedroom apartment on a high floor, offering stunning panoramic views of the sea and the city. Fully furnished with high-quality built-in furniture, this unit provides a comfortable living space with a pantry-style kitchen and a private balcony to enjoy the breeze.

title: Beachfront condominium at Sam Roi Yot Beach
desc: A contemporary beachfront condominium surrounded by 360-degree nature. Located directly on Sam Roi Yot Beach, only 30 minutes from Hua Hin. This modern unit is designed to offer the best views of both the sea and mountains, providing a private and peaceful atmosphere.
features: Beachfront with sea and mountain views

title: Modern 2-bedroom apartment at The Sanctuary Hua Hin
desc: A stylish and spacious 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom apartment located on the 7th floor of an 8-story luxury boutique complex. Only steps away from the quiet Takiab Beach, this fully furnished unit features a modern minimalist design and offers partial sea views.

title: Beachfront luxury ground floor apartment at Ocas Hua Hin
desc: Newly renovated beachfront apartment located on the ground floor with direct pool and beach access. This 103.12 sqm unit features a modern beach-style design, a master bathroom with a Jacuzzi bathtub, and is part of an exclusive low-rise project by Land and Houses.

title: Stunning 3-bedroom condominium with breathtaking views
desc: This stunning 8th-floor apartment offers panoramic views of the Hua Hin skyline from its spacious balcony. Fully furnished and decorated, it is an ideal choice for both a luxury residence and a high-yield rental investment. Located in the popular Soi 88 area.

title: Modern 2-bedroom condominium with mountain view near the beach
desc: A spacious 100 sqm apartment offering modern comfort surrounded by beautiful nature. Located just 5 minutes from Bluport Hua Hin and 6 minutes from Bangkok Hospital, this property features a European-style kitchen and a bright living room with mountain views.

title: Luxurious beachfront apartment at Wan Veyla, Khao Tao
desc: Discover coastal elegance in this spacious ground-floor unit at Wan Veyla Condominium. Offering a blend of tranquility and convenience, the apartment features direct pool access, a beautifully landscaped garden beach, and is just 12 minutes from Bluport Mall.
features: Direct pool access with pool view

title: Luxury 3-bedroom apartment for sale at Milford Paradise, Khao Tao
desc: A premium 18th-floor apartment offering the ultimate beachfront living experience. Located in the quiet area of Pak Nam Pran, this 208 sqm unit provides unparalleled relaxation with panoramic views of both the sea and the mountains. Part of a 30-story landmark building.
features: Close to Seoul Country Club and Sai Noi Beach

location.label: Hua Hin City Center (Baan San Ploen)

title: Luxury beachfront apartment in the center of Hua Hin
desc: A well-maintained 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom apartment located on the 5th floor of the exclusive Baan San Ploen residence by Sansiri. Offering a bright living area and large private balconies with mountain and nature views, this property provides direct access to Hua Hin beach and is within walking distance to Market Village.
features: Fully furnished & Ready to move in
Lagoon swimming pools & Sea view pool
